title: EfficientNet Lite
long_description: EfficientNet Lite is a lightweight deep learning model optimized for image classification on edge devices. It builds on EfficientNet’s compound scaling, balancing depth, width, and resolution for efficiency. Trained on ImageNet, it delivers high accuracy with low latency, making it ideal for mobile and embedded AI applications requiring real-time inference.

links.label: GitHub
links.heading: Try Today
links.sub-heading: Deploy the pre-trained model to your PSOC™ Edge Eval Kit
